_publications._publicationTitle: Drug Responses in Plexiform Neurofibroma Type I (PNF1) Cell Lines Using High-Throughput Data and Combined Effectiveness and Potency.

_contextSnippet: Using our algorithm, we recapitulate the identification of MEK inhibitors as potential therapeutics for NF1-related tumors and identify other compounds to which PNF1 cell lines are particularly sensitive or resistant
details: Algorithm can recapitulate the identification of MEK inhibitors as potential therapeutics for NF1-related tumors and identify other compounds to which PNF1 cell lines are particularly sensitive or resistant
